name: Asutosh Kumar Gupta
summary: Experienced Full Stack Python Developer with 5.5+ years of expertise in software development, system design, and machine learning engineering. Strong focus on Python, React.js, Databricks AIML Ops, and cloud-native architectures (AWS, Kubernetes). Proven track record: reduced manual ML deployment intervention by 60%, improved cloud cost efficiency by 30%, reduced API response times by 30%. Hands-on experience in Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, prompt engineering, CI/CD automation, and large-scale data processing across healthcare and fintech domains.

highlights: Led design and development of scalable MLOps pipelines using RabbitMQ, Redshift, FastAPI, Kubernetes, and Helm
Automated ML pipeline deployments on Databricks AIML Ops and AWS, reducing manual intervention by 60% and cloud cost by 30%
Built GenAI products (FRM and GTM) using LLMs, LangGraph, and prompt engineering for ML lifecycle management
Produced architecture and design artifacts for complex ML workflows ensuring production resiliency and compliance
Architected end-to-end financial product platform using FastAPI, RabbitMQ, AWS Redshift and scalable DB architectures
Optimised API performance achieving ~30% reduction in response times and improved data consistency
Implemented CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions), improving release frequency by 40% with zero-downtime deployments
Delivered 10+ high-impact features driving 35% increase in user engagement; improved defect detection by 25%

experience.company: ZOOMRX Healthcare Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd
highlights: Redesigned critical APIs using FastAPI and Django, improving data retrieval time by 40%
Optimised backend ETL pipelines using Apache Beam, processing 500GB+ of healthcare data daily
Designed and developed React-based UI to trigger and monitor ETL pipelines
Led end-to-end development of transaction-based software using Django and FastAPI
Built cloud-native payment data pipelines on GCP with security, reliability, and cost efficiency focus
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, increasing developer productivity by 30%
Developed reusable React components improving code maintainability and user experience
